description: Norfolk, Va., aboard USS Harry S. Truman (CVN 75) Oct. 9, 2002 -- Internationally renowned rock band "Aerosmith" (from left: Tom Hamilton, Joey Kramer, Joe Perry, and Steven Tyler) visited with Truman Sailors and toured the aircraft carrier pier side at Norfolk Naval Station. The band had returned to perform in the area, having cancelled their original performance scheduled for September 11, 2001. U.S. Navy photo by Photographer's Mate 3rd Class Christopher B. Stoltz. (RELEASED)
